requirement_topic.en: LEWA / LEC Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and Likely NRS Practice
requirement_topic.zh: LEWA / LEC并网——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及可能适用的NRS规程
requirement_topic.zht: LEWA / LEC併網——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及可能適用的NRS規程

summary.en: Grid-connected PV inverter projects in Lesotho should be cleared through LEWA regulatory requirements and LEC connection review before commissioning. Lesotho's nominal LV grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, genuinely matching China's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz base parameters. The match reduces voltage/frequency reconfiguration risk, but it does not remove the need for Lesotho project acceptance. Because Lesotho is a landlocked enclave within South Africa, a SACU member, and imports most electricity from South Africa in addition to Muela hydro generation, LEC project practice may reference South African NRS embedded-generation interconnection requirements. Inverter documentation should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface performance, and any LEC-specified protection, reconnection, voltage/frequency ride-through, metering, and commissioning requirements.
summary.zh: 莱索托并网光伏逆变器项目在投运前应通过LEWA监管要求和LEC接入审查。莱索托低压电网名义参数为220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz基础参数真正相同。这一匹配降低了电压/频率重新配置风险，但不免除莱索托项目验收要求。由于莱索托是被南非环绕的内陆国、SACU成员，并且除Muela水电外大部分电力依赖南非进口，LEC项目实践可能引用南非NRS分布式发电并网要求。逆变器文件应围绕IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口性能，以及LEC指定的保护、重连、电压/频率穿越、计量和调试要求准备。
summary.zht: 賴索托併網光伏逆變器項目在投運前應通過LEWA監管要求和LEC接入審查。賴索托低壓電網名義參數為220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz基礎參數真正相同。這一匹配降低了電壓/頻率重新配置風險，但不免除賴索托項目驗收要求。由於賴索托是被南非環繞的內陸國、SACU成員，並且除Muela水電外大部分電力依賴南非進口，LEC項目實踐可能引用南非NRS分散式發電併網要求。逆變器文件應圍繞IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網接口性能，以及LEC指定的保護、重連、電壓/頻率穿越、計量和調試要求準備。

standards_or_laws: LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority regulatory framework for electricity-sector licensing and oversight
LEC — Lesotho Electricity Company grid-connection approval and project-specific technical review
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
NRS 097-2-1 — South African grid interconnection practice for small-scale embedded generation, likely relevant where LEC applies South African technical practice

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence for PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024, together with domestic anti-islanding and grid-support tests. China's nominal LV supply is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, which genuinely matches Lesotho's nominal voltage and frequency. However, China-side grid certificates, firmware settings, and utility approvals are based on Chinese grid-code procedures and do not automatically satisfy LEC connection approval, LEWA conditions, IEC 62116/IEC 61727 evidence needs, or any NRS-based project requirements in Lesotho.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024，以及国内防孤岛和电网友好性测试。中国低压供电名义参数为220/380 V、50 Hz，与莱索托名义电压和频率真正相同。然而，中国侧并网证书、固件设置和电网公司审批基于中国电网规范程序，不能自动满足LEC接入批准、LEWA条件、IEC 62116/IEC 61727证据需求或莱索托项目可能适用的NRS要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024，以及國內防孤島和電網友好性測試。中國低壓供電名義參數為220/380 V、50 Hz，與賴索托名義電壓和頻率真正相同。然而，中國側併網證書、韌體設置和電網公司審批基於中國電網規範程序，不能自動滿足LEC接入批准、LEWA條件、IEC 62116/IEC 61727證據需求或賴索托項目可能適用的NRS要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages), China 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline

gap.en: Gap: The base voltage and frequency match China, but Chinese GB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for LEC/LEWA project approval. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the exact inverter model or family, document the installed firmware configuration for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, and ask LEC whether NRS 097-2-1 or other South African interconnection requirements apply. Protection thresholds, reconnection delays, export-limitation settings, metering arrangements, and commissioning tests should be confirmed directly with LEC for the project.
gap.zh: 差距：基础电压和频率与中国一致，但中国GB/T并网证据不能替代LEC/LEWA项目批准。出口商应为具体逆变器型号或系列准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口报告，记录用于220/380 V 50 Hz运行的安装固件配置，并向LEC确认是否适用NRS 097-2-1或其他南非并网要求。保护阈值、重连延时、限发设置、计量安排和调试测试应针对项目直接与LEC确认。
gap.zht: 差距：基礎電壓和頻率與中國一致，但中國GB/T併網證據不能替代LEC/LEWA項目批准。出口商應為具體逆變器型號或系列準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網接口報告，記錄用於220/380 V 50 Hz運行的安裝韌體配置，並向LEC確認是否適用NRS 097-2-1或其他南非併網要求。保護閾值、重連延時、限發設置、計量安排和調試測試應針對項目直接與LEC確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected PV projects — LEWA regulatory conditions and LEC connection approval must be satisfied before commissioning; technical evidence is project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection testing and approvals are mandatory or required by Chinese grid operators for domestic projects, but they are not transferable to Lesotho

source.publisher: LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lesotho and China genuinely share 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal grid parameters, but Chinese GB/T grid certificates do not automatically satisfy LEC and LEWA requirements. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, document the exact firmware configuration, and confirm whether LEC applies NRS 097 or other South African interconnection rules before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莱索托与中国确实共享220/380 V 50 Hz名义电网参数，但中国GB/T并网证书不会自动满足LEC和LEWA要求。应准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，记录准确固件配置，并在出货或投运前确认LEC是否适用NRS 097或其他南非并网规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 賴索托與中國確實共享220/380 V 50 Hz名義電網參數，但中國GB/T併網證書不會自動滿足LEC和LEWA要求。應準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，記錄準確韌體配置，並在出貨或投運前確認LEC是否適用NRS 097或其他南非併網規則。
